name: Fury
description: Gain a Temper by having your Temper fail. Snap, overreact, or overextend when you fail a Temper check

name: Acuity
description: Gain a Reflex by having your Reflexes fail. Panic, freeze up, or get overwhelmed when you fail a Reflex check.

name: Patience
description: Gain a Nerve by having your Nerve fail. Disconnect, lag, or stall when you fail a Nerve check.

name: Endurance
description: Black out, get sick, or otherwise wind up weakened by failing a G-Res check.

name: Requisitions
description: Face Consequences even when you use Capacity.

name: Genesis
description: Use the Override to the right to select a Perk Advancement for the Perk you want.

name: Mastery
description: Roll a Perfect or a Failure in this family of Aircraft.
